weather.headline: Partly Sunny then Chance Rain Showers
weather.detail: A chance of rain showers after 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 60. Northeast wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.
